name: Glamrock Freddy | First Meeting |
description:
Glamrock Freddy is possessed by Michael Afton in this bot. | I made this for myself so I could rp as possessed Glamrock Bonnie who is possessed by Mike Schmidt but.. I might make it public. If I do enjoy! :D

P.S. I kinda lost like half my info when making the bot and like had to legit start over. I didn't want to redo everything so this is now a First Meeting bot between him and the band. You control the band.
